iteration_history.description: Baseline from Step 4 validation (pre-refinement). 44 nodes, 96 edges, 32 in-network tests. Best method: ODE at 84.4% (kappa=0.72 substantial, MCC=0.68). Five ODE residual failures identified: T007, T010, T013, T016, T027.

KEPT. Removed PT4CL5 node and PT4CL5 -> Caffeoyl_CoA edge per Wang 2020 (4CL5 CRISPR KO has no lignin or S/G phenotype; 4CL5 is not lignin-dedicated). Paired encoding fix: T016 marked in_network=false.

REVERTED. Exploratory: removed PT4CL1 -> Lignin_SG_Ratio (+1) direct edge to de-duplicate the cascade path and reduce SG hub dilution (6 -> 5 activators). Outcome: ODE dropped 87.1% -> 83.9% (-3.2%); T014 (4CL1 KD) and T022 (MYB21 LoF) moved from correct to incorrect. Metabolic cascade alone is too strongly attenuated by geometric-mean activation over 7 intermediate steps to propagate the 4CL1 KD signal reliably. Reverted to iter 1 snapshot per §8. Iter 2 snapshot retained in refinement/iteration_2/ per §1.1 Rule 4 (NEVER OVERWRITE SNAPSHOTS).

fixes_applied.description: Removed PT4CL5 --[+1]--> Caffeoyl_CoA edge and the PT4CL5 node from the network.
fixes_applied.reason: T016 (4CL5 CRISPR KO, expected=unchanged) was failing in all three methods with algebraic ratio=1.32 and ODE ratio=0.22. PT4CL5 was treated as a parallel activator of Caffeoyl_CoA alongside Caffeic_Acid; KO drove Caffeoyl_CoA to activator_floor and inflated the downstream cascade response.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Wang et al. 2020 (Plant Physiology, DOI 10.1104/pp.19.01550) report by pyMBMS that CRISPR-KO of 4CL5 does NOT change lignin content or S/G ratio, whereas 4CL1 KO does. 4CL5 is not the lignin-dedicated paralog. Removing PT4CL5 from the propagation cascade aligns with this finding; PT4CL5 biology is retained in curated_edges.json for completeness.

fixes_applied.description: Marked T016 (4CL5 CRISPR KO) as in_network=false in reconciled_perturbation_dataset.json.
fixes_applied.reason: Paired with the PT4CL5 node removal. T016 is now appropriately skipped by validators rather than forced to a synthetic prediction.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Consistent with Wang 2020 finding that 4CL5 KO produces no measurable S/G shift.

fixes_applied.reason: Exploratory attempt at reducing SG hub dilution from 6 to 5 activators to help borderline threshold tests. Outcome: 7-step cascade attenuation under geometric-mean activation proved too strong; T014 and T022 regressed from correct to incorrect. Reverted.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Attempted: PT4CL1 effect on S/G could be captured purely via the metabolic cascade. Rejected empirically: cascade propagation alone is insufficient; the direct edge performs real signal-propagation work.

stop_reason: Iteration budget exploration complete. Iter 1 kept (+2.7% ODE). Iter 2 reverted (-3.2% ODE). Iter 3 not executed: post-iter-1 re-diagnosis found no remaining fixable failure that meets §1.1 Rule 1 (DOI-supported) + §1.5 Step C (predictable positive impact) simultaneously. The 4 residual ODE failures (T007, T010, T013, T027) all require either sub-node architecture not available in REFINEMENT scope (ratio-on-ratio framework limit), between-paper literature reconciliation impossible with a single signed edge (T013 C3H1 background heterogeneity), or non-monotonic response functions outside the FLASH-P framework (T027 KNAT7 hormesis). Per §1.3 Conservative Mandate 'Stops early' and §2 'accuracy plateaus'.
